steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes how the character was 'wakened' from a beautiful dream. The context signals a jarring, sudden transition—not gradual or voluntary. The correct word must capture that abruptness.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'abruptly': Precisely matches the jarring, unexpected jolt of being woken suddenly. ✓
  • Choice B — 'repeatedly': Implies recurrence, but nothing in the passage supports being woken multiple times. ✗
  • Choice C — 'willingly': Suggests voluntary action—the opposite of being woken from a dream. ✗
  • Choice D — 'gently': Contradicts the sudden, jarring quality of 'wakened suddenly.' ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
